data.content: Implementation review requested changes: the terminal logging change in src/lib/terminal-manager.ts appears correct, but the required behavior is not directly covered by an automated assertion, and bun test src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts currently fails before running assertions with TypeError: vi.importActual is not a function. Add a test that verifies the Claimed and TAKE log lines include the selected agent label, then re-run the relevant sanity checks.
